instruction: The Toronto release setup still has one stale detail in it. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale sync, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.
canonical_instruction: I need the Toronto release setup cleaned up. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale sync, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.
instruction_variants: Something's off in the Toronto release setup. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale sync, update the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.
